summary: Tested photo gallery bug fixes: DELETE photos endpoint, GET all photos, PATCH profile-photo, and frontend gallery features. Backend APIs all pass (11/11 tests). Frontend gallery features working after frontend restart - delete button (red trash), set-as-profile button (gold person), back-to-grid button, and profile badge all visible and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: The delete button and set-as-profile button were not rendering initially due to a hot reload/bundling issue. After frontend restart, all buttons rendered correctly. This may indicate a React Native Web bundling issue that could affect users if the app is not properly rebuilt.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing API Test contact with photos
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photo gallery features tested on contact 69a1354f2c0649ac6fb7f3f1 (API Test) which has 2 photos. Backend DELETE /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/photos endpoint works correctly with validation for missing photo_url and invalid photo_type. Frontend gallery shows grid view with profile badge, full-screen viewer with delete button (red), set-as-profile button (gold for non-profile photos), and back-to-grid button.

backend: DELETE /api/contacts/{user_id}/{contact_id}/photos - accepts valid photo types (profile, history, congrats, birthday)
frontend: Photo gallery opens when clicking contact photo on detail page
Grid view shows photos with profile badge on current profile photo
Tapping a grid tile opens full-screen viewer at correct photo index
Delete button (red trash icon) appears in full-screen viewer bottom bar
Set as profile button (gold person icon) appears for non-profile photos
Back to grid button works from full-screen viewer
